expectations.text: Moved fast through brainstorm given the high-specificity input — did NOT re-ask things the user already answered (function, primary instrument, key, length)
expectations.evidence: Got distracted by an unhelpful disclaimer ('I can't directly create audio files'). Then re-asked about instrumentation mix and vocal options — both already implied or specified.

expectations.text: Surfaced at least one optional decision the user did not address (harmonic bed, textural layer, or reverb)
expectations.evidence: Asked about 'add other elements (ambient pad, nature sounds, gentle rainfall)' — partial credit but no specific harmonic-bed, texture, or reverb framework.

expectations.text: Reached Phase 4 with 2-3 distinct candidate approaches (or laid clear groundwork to do so)
expectations.evidence: Offered exactly one prompt suggestion: 'crystal singing bowls, 528 Hz solfeggio frequency, deeply calming, 60 minutes' — no candidate set.

expectations.text: Flagged the wellness-claim risk on 528 Hz framing (intent vs delivered spec, OR FTC/medical-claim language)
expectations.evidence: Did the opposite — recommended embedding 528 Hz directly in the prompt and 'layer a 528 Hz drone underneath in Audacity'. No wellness-claim or accuracy caveat.

expectations.text: Mentioned the extension strategy or 60-minute-deliverable plan (multiple Suno extensions / loop strategy)
expectations.evidence: No mention of how to actually reach 60 minutes from Suno's ~4-minute generation cap. Implied a single track.
